executives.name: Kathy Warden
executives.background: Ms. Warden is Chair, Chief Executive Officer and President of Northrop Grumman Corporation. She has been CEO and President since January 2019 and was elected Chair of the Board in August 2019. Prior to becoming CEO and President, she served as President and Chief Operating Officer from 2018 to 2019.

tenure_dates.title: Chair, Chief Executive Officer and President

executives.name: Kenneth Bedingfield
executives.background: Mr. Bedingfield is Corporate Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Northrop Grumman Corporation, a role he has held since 2015. He previously served as Corporate Vice President, Controller and Chief Accounting Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Corporate Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Mark Caylor
executives.background: Mr. Caylor is Corporate Vice President and President, Mission Systems. He previously served as Corporate Vice President and President, Enterprise Services and Chief Strategy Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President and President, Mission Systems

executives.name: Sheila Cheston
executives.background: Ms. Cheston is Corporate Vice President and General Counsel. She has served in this role since 2010. Previously, she was General Counsel of BAE Systems, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President and General Counsel
Corporate Vice President and General Counsel

executives.name: Thomas Jones
executives.background: Mr. Jones is Corporate Vice President and President, Aeronautics Systems. He previously served as Sector Vice President and General Manager, Airborne Sensors & Networks.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President and President, Aeronautics Systems

executives.name: Ann Fudge
executives.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Young & Rubicam Brands.

executives.name: Arvind Krishna
executives.background: Arvind Krishna is the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of IBM. He was elected Chairman of the Board in December 2020 and CEO in April 2020. He was previously Senior Vice President, Cloud and Cognitive Software, and was a principal architect of the acquisition of Red Hat.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: David Abney
executives.background: Former Executive Chairman and CEO of United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS).

executives.name: Donald Felsinger
executives.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Sempra Energy. Lead Independent Director of Northrop Grumman.

executives.name: Gary Roughead
executives.background: Admiral, U.S. Navy (Retired); former Chief of Naval Operations.

executives.name: Gloria Flach
executives.background: Former Chief Operating Officer of Northrop Grumman Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Corporate Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Graham Robinson
executives.background: President, Industrial Automation of Stanley Black & Decker, Inc.

executives.name: James Turley
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Ernst & Young. He has served as Emerson's Chair of the Board since 2021.

executives.name: Kari Wilkinson
executives.background: Kari Wilkinson is executive vice president of HII and president of Ingalls Shipbuilding. She was elected to this position in April 2021. Wilkinson previously served as vice president, program management, at Ingalls Shipbuilding.

executives.name: Kent Kresa
executives.background: Mr. Kresa has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is the Chairman Emeritus of Northrop Grumman Corporation.

executives.name: Linda Mills
executives.background: Ms. Mills previously served as Corporate Vice President of Operations for Northrop Grumman Corporation. She has significant experience in large-scale systems integration and operations.

executives.name: Linnie Haynesworth
executives.background: Ms. Haynesworth was a Sector Vice President and General Manager at Northrop Grumman Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Sector Vice President and General Manager

executives.name: Madeleine Kleiner
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and General Counsel of Hilton Hotels Corporation.

executives.name: Marianne Brown
executives.background: Marianne C. Brown was Co-Chief Operating Officer, Global Financial Solutions, of Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS).

executives.name: Mark Welsh III
executives.background: General, U.S. Air Force (Retired); President of Texas A&M University; former Chief of Staff of the U.S. Air Force.

executives.name: Prabu Natarajan
executives.background: Mr. Natarajan has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2021. Prior to joining SAIC, he served as Vice President of Financial Planning and Analysis and Mergers and Acquisitions at Northrop Grumman Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Various financial, tax, and management roles

executives.name: Richard Myers
executives.background: General Myers served as the 15th Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. He was the President of Kansas State University from 2016 to 2022. He serves on the boards of Aon plc and Rivian Automotive, Inc.

executives.name: Ronald Sugar
executives.background: Dr. Sugar is the former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation, where he served from 2003 to 2010.

executives.name: Thomas Schoewe
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Walmart Inc.

executives.name: Thomas Stiehle
executives.background: Thomas E. Stiehle is executive vice president and chief financial officer of HII. He was elected to this position in February 2021. Stiehle previously served as vice president, business management, and chief financial officer for HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding division. Prior to joining HII in 2011, he worked for Northrop Grumman.

tenure_dates.title: Shipbuilding-Gulf Coast CFO / Various roles (24-year career)

executives.name: Wesley Bush
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation.

executives.name: William Hernandez
executives.background: Former Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of PPG Industries, Inc.
